docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXEY KUDINKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORINNE NG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-12-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXEY KUDINKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORINNE NG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00 SERVED JAN-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CORINNE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KUDINKIN, ALEXEY AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CORINNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-16-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALEXEY KUNDINKIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CORINNE NG IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2022 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KUDINKIN, ALEXEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NG, CORINNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
